inputs.label: Gross Salary
inputs.businessContext: Employee's annual gross salary before taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Employee's annual gross salary before taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışanın vergi öncesi yıllık brüt maaşı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Bruttogehalt des Arbeitnehmers vor Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire brut annuel de l'employé avant impôts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario bruto anual del empleado antes de impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الراتب السنوي الإجمالي للموظف قبل الضرائب.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 1
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the first income bracket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax rate for the first income bracket.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci gelir dilimi için vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition pour la première tranche de revenu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva para el primer tramo de ingresos.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 2
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the second income bracket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax rate for the second income bracket.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci gelir dilimi için vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition pour la deuxième tranche de revenu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva para el segundo tramo de ingresos.

inputs.label: Tax Rate Bracket 3
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate for the third income bracket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax rate for the third income bracket.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü gelir dilimi için vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition pour la troisième tranche de revenu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva para el tercer tramo de ingresos.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite supérieure de revenu de la tranche 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite superior de ingresos del tramo 1.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite de revenu supérieure de la tranche 2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite superior de ingresos del tramo 2.

formulas.bracket1Tax: grossSalary <= bracket1Limit ? grossSalary * taxRate1 / 100 : bracket1Limit * taxRate1 / 100
formulas.bracket2Tax: grossSalary <= bracket1Limit ? 0 : grossSalary <= bracket2Limit ? (grossSalary - bracket1Limit) * taxRate2 / 100 : (bracket2Limit - bracket1Limit) * taxRate2 / 100

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
